missing-strict-transport-security.impact_en: Visitors can be silently switched to an insecure connection by an attacker on the same Wi-Fi — they would not know this is happening, and anything they type could be read.
missing-strict-transport-security.fix_en: Ask your web host or developer to add: Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains
missing-strict-transport-security.impact_sw: Wateja wanaweza kuunganishwa kwa njia isiyo salama bila kujua — mshambuliaji kwenye mtandao huo huo anaweza kusoma kila kitu wanachoandika.
missing-strict-transport-security.fix_sw: Mwombe msanidi wa tovuti yako kuongeza: Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains

missing-content-security-policy.impact_en: Without this protection, if an attacker ever injects code into your site, it can run freely and steal customer data or redirect visitors to a fake page.
missing-content-security-policy.fix_en: Add a Content-Security-Policy header. Your developer can start with a basic policy and tighten it over time.
missing-content-security-policy.title_sw: Sera ya Usalama wa Maudhui Haipo
missing-content-security-policy.impact_sw: Bila ulinzi huu, ikiwa mshambuliaji ataweza kuingiza msimbo kwenye tovuti yako, unaweza kuendesha bila vizuizi na kuiba data za wateja.
missing-content-security-policy.fix_sw: Ongeza kichwa cha Content-Security-Policy. Msanidi wako anaweza kuanza na sera ya msingi na kuiimarisha baadaye.

missing-x-frame-options.title_en: Site Can Be Embedded in Fake Pages (Clickjacking Risk)
missing-x-frame-options.impact_en: Your site can be hidden inside a fake page to trick users into clicking things they did not mean to — a common trick for stealing login credentials.
missing-x-frame-options.fix_en: Add: X-Frame-Options: DENY (or SAMEORIGIN if you embed your own pages in iframes)
missing-x-frame-options.title_sw: Tovuti Inaweza Kufichwa Ndani ya Ukurasa Bandia
missing-x-frame-options.impact_sw: Tovuti yako inaweza kufichwa ndani ya ukurasa bandia ili kuwadanganya watumiaji wabofye vitu bila kukusudia — mbinu ya kawaida ya kuiba nywila.
missing-x-frame-options.fix_sw: Ongeza: X-Frame-Options: DENY (au SAMEORIGIN ikiwa unaingiza kurasa zako mwenyewe)

missing-x-content-type-options.impact_en: Browsers might try to execute uploaded files as code if they guess the file type incorrectly. A low risk for most sites, but simple to fix.
missing-x-content-type-options.impact_sw: Vivinjari vinaweza kutekeleza faili zilizopakiwa kama msimbo ikiwa vitakisia aina ya faili vibaya. Hatari ndogo, lakini rahisi kurekebisha.

missing-referrer-policy.title_en: Website Address Leaks to Other Sites
missing-referrer-policy.impact_en: When a visitor clicks a link to another site, your full web address is shared with that site — including any sensitive information in the URL.
missing-referrer-policy.title_sw: Anwani ya Tovuti Inaweza Kushirikiwa na Tovuti Nyingine
missing-referrer-policy.impact_sw: Mtumiaji akibofya kiungo kwenda tovuti nyingine, anwani yako kamili inashirikiwa na tovuti hiyo, ikiwemo taarifa nyeti kwenye URL.

missing-permissions-policy.impact_en: Your site does not limit which browser features (camera, microphone, location) scripts can access. Low risk for most business sites but good practice.
missing-permissions-policy.impact_sw: Tovuti yako haizuii ni vipengele vipi vya kivinjari ambavyo hati zinaweza kufikia. Hatari ndogo kwa tovuti nyingi za biashara lakini ni mazoea mazuri.

server-version-disclosed.title_en: Software Version Exposed in Server Banner
server-version-disclosed.impact_en: Your website tells attackers exactly which software and version you run, making it easier to find a known exploit that targets that specific version.
server-version-disclosed.fix_en: Ask your host to hide the server version. In nginx: server_tokens off;  In Apache: ServerTokens Prod
server-version-disclosed.title_sw: Toleo la Programu Limedhihirishwa kwenye Bendera ya Seva
server-version-disclosed.impact_sw: Tovuti yako inawaambia washambuliaji toleo halisi la programu unayotumia, kuwarahisishia kupata udhaifu unaofanana.
server-version-disclosed.fix_sw: Mwombe mwenyeji wako kuficha toleo la seva. Katika nginx: server_tokens off;  Katika Apache: ServerTokens Prod

weak-cookie-flags.impact_en: Cookies that track logged-in customers lack security flags. An attacker on the same network could steal a customer session and act as that person.
weak-cookie-flags.fix_en: Set the Secure and HttpOnly flags on all session cookies. Your developer can add these in one line of code.
weak-cookie-flags.impact_sw: Vidakuzi vinavyofuatilia wateja walioingia havina alama za usalama. Mshambuliaji kwenye mtandao huo huo anaweza kuiba kikao na kujifanya kuwa mteja huyo.
weak-cookie-flags.fix_sw: Weka alama za Secure na HttpOnly kwenye vidakuzi vyote vya vikao. Msanidi wako anaweza kufanya hivi kwa mstari mmoja wa msimbo.

no-https-redirect.title_en: Site Does Not Force Secure Connection
no-https-redirect.impact_en: Some visitors land on the unencrypted version of your site without realising it. Everything they type is visible to anyone monitoring the network.
no-https-redirect.fix_en: Set up a 301 redirect from http:// to https:// in your web server config or hosting control panel.
no-https-redirect.impact_sw: Baadhi ya wageni huingia kwenye toleo lisilo na usimbaji wa tovuti yako bila kujua. Kila kitu wanachoandika kinaonekana kwenye mtandao.
no-https-redirect.fix_sw: Weka upelekaji wa 301 kutoka http:// kwenda https:// kwenye seva yako ya tovuti au paneli ya udhibiti wa mwenyeji.

self-signed-cert.title_en: Website Uses an Untrusted Security Certificate
self-signed-cert.impact_en: Browsers will show a red Not Secure warning to every visitor. Most people leave immediately, costing you customers and trust.
self-signed-cert.fix_en: Replace the self-signed certificate with a free Let's Encrypt certificate, available from your hosting provider or via certbot.eff.org.
self-signed-cert.title_sw: Tovuti Inatumia Cheti cha Usalama Kisichoaminika
self-signed-cert.impact_sw: Vivinjari vitaonyesha onyo jekundu kwa kila mgeni. Watu wengi wataondoka mara moja, na utapoteza wateja na imani.
self-signed-cert.fix_sw: Badilisha cheti kilichojisainiwa na cheti cha Let's Encrypt cha bure, kinachopatikana kutoka kwa mwenyeji wako au kupitia certbot.eff.org.

cert-validation-failed.impact_en: Browsers warn visitors that your site may not be who it claims to be. This seriously damages trust and may block access for some customers entirely.
cert-validation-failed.fix_en: Check that your certificate is issued for the correct domain name and has not expired. Contact your hosting provider to renew or reissue it.
cert-validation-failed.impact_sw: Vivinjari vinawaarifu wageni kwamba tovuti yako inaweza isiwe ni wewe unayedai. Hii inaathiri sana imani na inaweza kuzuia ufikiaji kabisa.
cert-validation-failed.fix_sw: Hakikisha cheti chako kimetolewa kwa jina sahihi la kikoa na halijakwisha muda. Wasiliana na mtoa huduma wako wa mwenyeji.

no-tls.title_en: Website Has No Encryption At All
no-tls.impact_en: Every password, payment detail, and message sent through your site is visible to anyone on the same network. This is the most serious risk for your customers.
no-tls.fix_en: Install an SSL/TLS certificate immediately. Your hosting provider can usually do this for free using Let's Encrypt — call them today.
no-tls.impact_sw: Kila nywila, maelezo ya malipo, na ujumbe unaotumwa kupitia tovuti yako unaonekana kwa mtu yeyote kwenye mtandao huo. Hii ndiyo hatari kubwa zaidi inayowezekana.
no-tls.fix_sw: Sakinisha cheti cha SSL/TLS mara moja. Mtoa huduma wako wa mwenyeji anaweza kufanya hivi bure kwa kutumia Let's Encrypt.

cert-expired.impact_en: Browsers are showing a full red-screen warning to every visitor right now. Your site is effectively unreachable for most customers.
cert-expired.fix_en: Renew your SSL certificate immediately. Contact your hosting provider — most can renew it for free within minutes.
cert-expired.impact_sw: Vivinjari vinaonyesha onyo jekundu la skrini nzima kwa kila mgeni sasa hivi. Tovuti yako kwa kweli haifikiwi kwa wateja wengi.
cert-expired.fix_sw: Funga upya cheti chako cha SSL mara moja. Wasiliana na mtoa huduma wako wa mwenyeji.

cert-expiring-soon.impact_en: Soon browsers will show customers a red Not Secure warning and many will leave, costing you sales and trust.
cert-expiring-soon.fix_en: Renew your SSL certificate now, before it expires. Most hosting providers do this automatically or for free on request.
cert-expiring-soon.title_sw: Cheti cha Usalama Kitakwisha Muda Ndani ya Wiki 2
cert-expiring-soon.impact_sw: Hivi karibuni vivinjari vitaonyesha onyo jekundu kwa wateja na wengi wataondoka, na utapoteza mauzo na imani.
cert-expiring-soon.fix_sw: Funga upya cheti chako cha SSL sasa, kabla ya kwisha muda. Watoa huduma wengi wa mwenyeji hufanya hivi kiotomatiki au bure ukiomba.

cert-expiring.impact_en: Your certificate will expire soon. If not renewed in time, browsers will block visitors with a security warning.
cert-expiring.fix_en: Schedule a certificate renewal with your hosting provider. Set a recurring reminder so this does not happen again.
cert-expiring.title_sw: Cheti cha Usalama Kitakwisha Muda Ndani ya Siku 30
cert-expiring.impact_sw: Cheti chako kitakwisha muda hivi karibuni. Ikiwa hakitafunguliwa upya, vivinjari vitazuia ufikiaji wa tovuti yako.
cert-expiring.fix_sw: Panga ufunguzi upya wa cheti na mtoa huduma wako wa mwenyeji. Weka ukumbusho ili hii isitokee tena.

outdated-tls-version.impact_en: Your site accepts connections using an old version of the encryption protocol with known weaknesses that attackers can exploit.
outdated-tls-version.fix_en: Disable TLS 1.0 and TLS 1.1 on your web server and enable TLS 1.2 and 1.3 only. Ask your hosting provider to make this change.
outdated-tls-version.title_sw: Inatumia Kiwango cha Usimbaji Kilichopitwa na Wakati
outdated-tls-version.impact_sw: Tovuti yako inakubali muunganisho kwa kutumia toleo la zamani la itifaki ya usimbaji ambalo lina udhaifu unaojulikana.
outdated-tls-version.fix_sw: Lemaza TLS 1.0 na 1.1 kwenye seva yako na uwashe TLS 1.2 na 1.3 peke yake. Mwombe mtoa huduma wako wa mwenyeji kufanya hivi.

no-a-record.title_en: Domain Has No Website DNS Record
no-a-record.impact_en: Your domain name does not point to any web server. The site may be unreachable for some visitors.
no-a-record.fix_en: Add an A record in your domain's DNS settings pointing to your web server's IP address.
no-a-record.title_sw: Kikoa Hana Rekodi ya DNS ya Tovuti
no-a-record.impact_sw: Jina lako la kikoa haliangazi seva yoyote ya tovuti. Tovuti inaweza kuwa haifikiwi kwa baadhi ya wageni.
no-a-record.fix_sw: Ongeza rekodi A kwenye mipangilio ya DNS ya kikoa chako inayoelekeza kwa anwani ya IP ya seva yako ya tovuti.

missing-spf.title_en: Email Can Be Sent From Your Domain by Anyone
missing-spf.impact_en: Anyone can send emails that appear to come from your business — a common trick used for fake invoices and M-Pesa fraud targeting your customers.
missing-spf.fix_en: Add an SPF TXT record to your DNS. Your email provider will give you the exact string. Example: v=spf1 include:mail.yourprovider.com ~all
missing-spf.title_sw: Barua Pepe Inaweza Kutumwa kwa Kutumia Jina Lako na Mtu Yeyote
missing-spf.impact_sw: Mtu yeyote anaweza kutuma barua pepe inayoonekana kana kwamba ni yako — mbinu ya kawaida ya ankara za uongo na ulaghai wa M-Pesa kwa wateja wako.
missing-spf.fix_sw: Ongeza rekodi ya SPF TXT kwenye DNS yako. Mtoa huduma wako wa barua pepe atakupa mfuatano sahihi. Mfano: v=spf1 include:mail.mtoa-wako.com ~all

missing-dmarc.impact_en: Without DMARC, fraudsters can send emails pretending to be you and email providers cannot automatically detect or block them.
missing-dmarc.fix_en: Add a DMARC TXT record at _dmarc.yourdomain.com with value: v=DMARC1; p=quarantine; rua=mailto:you@yourdomain.com
missing-dmarc.title_sw: Hakuna Ulinzi Dhidi ya Udanganyifu wa Barua Pepe
missing-dmarc.impact_sw: Bila DMARC, walaghai wanaweza kutuma barua pepe wakijifanya kuwa wewe, na watoa huduma wa barua pepe hawawezi kuzigundua au kuzizuia kiotomatiki.
missing-dmarc.fix_sw: Ongeza rekodi ya DMARC TXT kwenye _dmarc.kikoa-chako.com: v=DMARC1; p=quarantine; rua=mailto:wewe@kikoa-chako.com

no-caa.title_en: Any Certificate Authority Can Issue Your SSL Certificate
no-caa.impact_en: Without a CAA record, any of the hundreds of certificate authorities worldwide could issue a certificate for your domain, which could enable impersonation.
no-caa.fix_en: Add a CAA DNS record specifying which authorities may issue certificates for your domain. Example: 0 issue "letsencrypt.org"
no-caa.title_sw: Mamlaka Yoyote ya Cheti Inaweza Kutoa Cheti Chako cha SSL
no-caa.impact_sw: Bila rekodi ya CAA, mamlaka yoyote ya cheti duniani inaweza kutoa cheti kwa kikoa chako, ambayo inaweza kuruhusu udanganyifu.
no-caa.fix_sw: Ongeza rekodi ya CAA ya DNS inayobainisha ni mamlaka zipi zinaruhusiwa kutoa vyeti kwa kikoa chako. Mfano: 0 issue "letsencrypt.org"
